h4cb99766g3914g4346g8a71g6f29c68cda8e: Hold up. One more step, and I put a bolt through your eye.
h88030eaageadag4170g9c8fgbb663ebf97c2: Shifty fucker like you doesn't get a second warning, so no sudden movements.
h0110674ag902cg4833gb997g6f68111f7a77: Given how soft you look, I figure you spit fire and crap lightning, so no sudden movements.
hb650ccc2ga0f3g4361g8934gd166f5642e26: Haven't tangled with a gith before, but I hear you're tough. And disciplined. So let's make this quick.
hb7d9f7b2g6443g4eadg9b9fga741e172ee75: No sudden movements, or you're dead.
h1d7a2a49g2e19g4ec8ga8bfg1111b1290487: No, but I see you're hurt - let me help.
h7214f37egfe66g4c88g979fge5a5c15a66f4: Hurt or not, I won't miss - lung, heart, arse or eye. Take your pick.
h3c632e87gdf4dg4f23gaebeg8706462d3f6b: Tell me what you're doing here. Now.
h436b8e50gd462g4fb3gb177gc7a644918ac9: I'm hunting a fiend - you fit the description.
h600213a4g3500g4748ga3e6g76f5a8ede421: Somebody fed you a crock of shit, and you swallowed the lot.
h745a27a3g78c6g42a7gaf16g11b5f1b538e9: Don't sweat it - devils are tricky fuckers. They can't breathe without lying.
haddb6462g3abdg4da4g9eadg9cccdebc9071: They're not breathing anymore - I killed them.
hcc74c5dagf594g4fe4gb1dcg12e5204538e5: If you killed them, I'm guessing you didn't buy their bullshit.
h2cec53eag3c41g41e2g98d8gcda7e5460ee1: I guess they told you I bite the heads off babies, and paint myself in their blood.
h7409993age2ebg4431gbfd0g1badb7c53977: Truth's not quite so exciting. Come on over and I'll tell you the whole story.
h1fec12a2g7ef6g4195g8250gbb304b91b7d9: I'm a fugitive - escaped from the Hells, and those bastards are trying to take me back.
hbd61c89fg3684g4ed8gb35bgdd0523ec43c5: You were in hell? So was I, not long ago.
h6a3bf0e0gdc2eg49c9g82b0g2ed26322f558: *As she winces, agony shoots through you, as if your bodies share the same wound.*
hfc47d3cegbc43g48f2gbed5g4f56d3535f73: *Then you're lost in visions of demonic armies, as you tear through a landscape of fire and blood.*
h2c05d151gc570g45begb196g45cc8c85201f: *The Blood War. You saw it from above as the nautiloid passed through Avernus - this woman was on the frontline.*
h14674af8g57ebg435cg8838g117e1cc81586: Ster'ca. What was that? You were inside my head...
h7aabdd07g38a8g47dfg8026g11d195333817: That was one of my good days - the bad ones would knock you sick.
h2e12b45bg1055g46cega089g492fe4d2a834: Now tell me what you just did to me before I make sure you can never do it again.
h6ca3febeg0c0bg4506ga87dg2cc6b1a56454: It wasn't me - it's the parasites from the mind flayer ship. They connected us.
hd3586633g5b71g475cg9ddbg7cc346a94a92: Hold on a minute - you were on that ship? With the tentacles, and the worms?
h5ea5611dgde6bg45f2gbbdag1c87e4e4d8b6: I didn't think anyone else had survived.
h127aec78ge5c5g4343ga2efg44398daf3a45: I didn't see you aboard. Where were you?
h190eb3bbgd82eg4cdbg8943g7ba873239090: I boarded in Avernus - that ship was my way out.
h3a9e7330g06f2g4f57g99dfg2bd30a2501cd: No - I just saw a chance and I took it.
hd5716603g3074g4103g9edfgbf141d60d443: That ship could have been heading for Sigil or Limbo for all I cared - anything was better than staying.
hc741ffafg9fa5g4628g9b89g7ac1d5c6b312: And I'll be going straight back if those imp-fuckers catch me.
h57cda5a1gd056g4813ga921g1cd868b0549f: What makes you so important to them?
h443c2387g0813g460cga94eg17d5312842af: I was a prisoner, forced to fight in the Blood War - the eternal battle between bad and worse.
he9b3fd97gacc0g4c73g90dbg14aa5e75c61e: Most souls in Avernus are just meat for the grinder. But not me.
hc3217dc0g3db6g4c1dga4f3g857b4d9c1de5: I held my own. More than. Turns out I've got a knack for killing demons - and I enjoy it. That made me a valuable asset.
h2b59adf0ge7bcg43fbga92ag23b042e00c2e: Devils don't like to lose their assets.
hf70e3b25g8294g4d03gab7agc49dbf7224f3: Hard to believe you're a demon-slayer when you can't deal with a few cultists.
h059a679agb034g49f6gb0acgd02e6de1315e: Back in the Blood War, my commander gave me what I needed to get the job done. I had fire running through my veins.
h8e21687dg869dg45d8gb0b8ga5b9540a1745: I don't work for her anymore so I'm back to relying on muscle and steel - I'll be just fine.
he3428171g92e7g414ag9408g2431984c28b1: So you want me to kill the people hunting you?
h792bc12fg4da6g40cagad9cgb07f91d464b1: They cornered me in the tollhouse, just up the hill. Doubt they've gone far after the beating I gave them.
h279c6e2fgf388g416aga029g39621fa9cfd0: I'd come with you just to see them bleed, but I'm too busy bleeding myself. I'll be here when you're done.
hb68236c5g93a5g4e66ga550gd7b5de415974: Figures. I'll see you in hell one day, asshole.
h7dd8d3a5g4397g4e9agb850g1fca52e86823: What do I get in return?
hb03f6ccbg7c76g4d12g9f3eg2ec53f65bf6f: You get a friend who spat in Baphomet's eye and lived to tell the tale.
h1951a074g5945g41f6g9b36g4f8c263be367: They're not the kind of people you can run from. I need them dead.
hdfcc143cgec78g42b7gaac5gbf99671f8967: I'm not doing it - you're on your own.
h4bf8c641gfcacg45b3g8009g1728e7b31302: And they need you dead - I'm ending you.
hb641f176g7a1ag462cg88a3g08ca99f2c84a: I'm done listening - I'm ending you.
hde602bebg9c76g44cdg8a3cg940c76b960e0: Judging by the wound, I'm guessing they already found you.
h58852d94gbe6bg42f7g8069geaf6e1b84149: Yeah. Not far from here - gang of cultists cornered me in an abandoned tollhouse.
he1696d36g7edeg4ce1gae7ag2e8b4d6c10d6: I took out a couple, but I need them all dead.
h753d5479g1591g476dg8417g7bc2ea778228: If I do this, what do I get in return?
h2e64dd0cge9aag4cb3g9ea2g0d2b7a7eec1d: A gang of cultists cornered me in an abandoned tollhouse, not far from here.
hebbb255eg93e6g4449g89c3g1d499c6d3958: I don't believe a word of this.
h70475c72ga7c1g4e94gbedeg510f15c11e5f: Why were you in hell in the first place?
h7bf78d5ag4899g46f6ga21cga792dea8e84c: They don't need to catch you - I already did. You're finished.
h4b3ede38g2529g48a9g9215ge258a642bddc: Ha. Even if you take me, I'll see you in hell one day. And I'll rip your godsdamned spine out.
h01363037g4a8fg4b18ga093g462ac8742dab: You gave me some breathing room when you killed those imp-fuckers, but more will come.
h5582af77geda9g4ee1g8be2g6c806c28b04b: Why are you so important to them?
h170375cegb4eag49d7gb096gcc28ad1132b1: Most souls in the Blood War are just meat for the grinder, but not me.
hb3a7e08cg9ad4g4fd7g9516g5d4ee050dd2f: Safety in numbers? Not a bad idea.
h2f943f48gc757g4b54g8e95g80fc6adc3a67: Sorry - I left all my soul coins in hell.
h9a199c95gd60fg4d84g9191gbe9e1f907954: But I won't forget what you did, and I hope I can pay you back down the line.
h3a133be1g5bd9g4cffg88f5g5f65acd00424: Stowing away aboard a mind flayer's nautiloid? Pretty stupid.
h0871c6a8g386dg4072g9e55g6d596daa5e9a: If you'd seen as much of hell as I have, you'd rather have a flayer's tentacles up your arse than stay.
h77f5f63eg8424g4874g8c69gd6a5cf95ac28: You must have got clear of the crash site in a hurry.
hfa1f58b2g0b64g4054g982fg1f4950087e22: The place would have been crawling with cultists if I'd stuck around - and they'd have dragged us all back to Avernus.
h152e0addgc7f3g43e5g930ag781077aafbc1: I didn't do it on purpose.
h9986e73ag1d24g4346g8a8fg0e721dfffbb7: That's what I thought - it was something inside you. I felt it. One of those godsdamned worms, from the ship.
hec0c3685gfd04g4543g9871gde63652e050e: That was the least of what I can do.
hc7af7f35g6ecfg468ega812ga00328596e05: I'll knock your teeth down your throat if you keep playing games - this is serious. What was that?
he647ea7fga321g45e0ga9a5g94c9531fb2c0: Hold up - you fought in the Blood War?
h16852ba6gfb56g4badg939cg04b54b56b274: Yes, and I saw hell. You really are a fiend.
h8eca6232g758ag4b89g809eg4932826d0d06: Fuck this - I'm done being reasonable.
h7952a24fg62bdg4992gbf3cge1568a3d4158: I visited Avernus recently - seemed delightful.
h3f58ddebg70f0g4528ga19ag0d661ce31b87: It's not - it's a shitting catastrophe. But at least I'm out.
h1aa3a2fegec55g4a5dga8ebgba099d13ca77: I know - and I can save their souls by killing you.
he431d87eg55a9g4ecbg822egb68df6ff7576: I know - they offered a fine reward for your head. I intend to claim it.
heb094427ge466g4d30gbaa7gdaad328ac14e: You said yourself, devils are tricksters. I don't believe a word of this.
h0be62c28gd83cg4c56g901bg01b29fe3bd20: You're picking the wrong side here - those bastards aren't what they claim to be.
h89bfa2d2gbf14g46f7gb143gc40ec92097b0: Hold on - the people I spoke to were paladins, not devils.
he22e51b9g21cdg4108g808ag90a8501f9cef: Sure they were - and I'm Tiamat's left tit.
hd9a4dd9fg2615g46bagb272g090679f9b6e7: If you're not a fiend, what are you?
h5edd30b7gb9c4g4f27g9bd9ga4c88d3fba9a: What? You've never seen a tiefling before?
heb5712dagab29g4aa8gb278g62b8ec416ced: Are you demented? I'm a tiefling - same as you. More or less.
hf469c59fg8ca8g4088g90c8g203be7d5fe73: All right, I'm listening - what's really going on here?
h323cfe17g6761g437bgb585g2787f9247afb: They told me you'd slaughtered innocent families.
hf64925b5gf551g49dbg83b7gd7f198bfa9c1: Bullshit. I've never killed anyone who didn't deserve it.
h68646f00g6346g4940gbbb9g7e6c0fd6c7f9: Awful lot of people do deserve it though, don't you find?
h3475169ag4820g4379gace6gfb962468164a: Not another word - I'm ending you.
ha3a02cf8g3cdcg42a4g92ecg2f112c8f6f3a: But if you do cut me down - I'll see you in the Hells one day and return the favour. Count on it.
hf476bdf2gef13g446bgad58g839ad90ca885: I was warned you're dangerous - so am I.
h34230b78geee7g4a05g8ca8g83a69db32c99: If you bite as hard as you bark, we might just get along. I'm dangerous all right, but I've got no quarrel with you.
h097ec670g27f2g461ag94bfg04cba693a493: I reckon you've been sold a crock of shit about me.
ha1d179e1g4bceg487bgaa0cg0f36614892f9: If you keep pointing that thing at me this is going to end badly for you.
hbb7d0141g3d51g40bfgbb62gce7726de27a0: Hm. If you bite as hard as you bark, we might get along. I might even have a job for you.
hf9516000gd9ecg40cdg915cg9452eba6fa60: I'm in a tight spot - might not be able to get out of it alone.
h0736d62fgb06cg4cc8g85b8gb9670c5d3b72: Maybe I can help - fill me in.
h1ff7cc4dg5cd7g4e66g95adg0e1eab2970d1: Oh, I have. The kind of battles a cub like you sees in their nightmares.
h2cc4b225g7c8bg4f21gb56fg29ee26a89317: You've got my attention - what's your story?
h6a9b7d48g9d43g4923gb2b7ge6673635dcd2: All right. Come on over here. But fair warning - you might find this hard to believe.
h20f1e1f1g7a33g437cg973fgcaaba3c34d9d: I'm a fugitive. I escaped the Hells, and the bastards who were holding me there are trying to take me back.
h260befb0gdbefg4653ga865gbb8b3d668965: If I help you, what's in it for me?
he8b5c7fdg37fdg46fbg8c00g8315de90319d: You get a friend who'll put a dent in the skull of anyone who pisses you off.
h53dfada4g5b32g45fcgaa58g691afdaa334d: Cute. I've scraped more frightening things than you off my boot.
h1a11119egcc77g4473g92f5gf670f2429ca0: Either piss off, or show me what you're made of.
he27c294age0ceg4f9cgaf31g9d546f6912cc: I just want to know what's going on here, I swear.
h5d92472cg6fdeg4e61g9902gfa2f67a8f0ca: All right. Maybe the blood-loss is making me soft, but I'm going to trust you. For now.
h854c17beg9e9dg4612g8956g16e4957ea4ca: I'm good at reading people - there's a knack to it -  and I'm only getting one word from you.
h98c4a040g000cg4b43gbb30g9e4937f691e9: Piss off, or show me what you're made of.
he96941ccgd082g4824g99f7g29771c682d58: And I'm none of yours. So piss off.
he669cd57gca3dg45b8gad44g95c1e7b66d62: Yes I am - the people who are hunting you sent me.
h50bdab28g39e7g42ebg98a9g5e1d134a0342: I have no idea who you are.
hb3e19625g3772g414eg8366gb1c0aaef8cc5: You just happened to stumble across me, here in the arse-end of nowhere? Bullshit.
hb6f4a0e4gb5cbg450eg935bge7e14ead6952: I met the others who were sent for you - told them I'd help.
h577ddec4g0915g4f02gb3e5gf4ab516e1bbc: *Her mind touches yours - gratitude, warmth, and relief.*
h3fb7f088gec78g4be9gb16eg256d7219155a: *Then a light, sharper than the truest blade, brighter than a star. It fills you with awe, forcing you to your knees.*
hb6a1580bg879eg4919g8fbbg312c16719193: *And from within, a winged figure steps foward, graceful and terrible. She places her hand on your cheek.*
h2d02dbfdg641bg4ce0gbc6eg81504e86ab9a: *And smiles as she carves her name across your chest.*
haf5f89cfg92c7g40a9gadf8g043837c2489e: Her words are spoken in the infernal tongue of devils. A threat, or a plea: 'I don't belong to you'.
haf1b617eg113cg4a1eg87c6g1d95f3ca0515: She thinks she owns you? Who is she?
hfdfda4bbge5ceg4890gb2b6ge117a06336da: Zariel. Fallen lady, defiled celestial... ruler of Avernus. I was her prisoner, and her champion.
hc2fd3932g99c9g42d0gb338g6eff07a46870: The paladins you killed were acting on her orders - she'll send more. And worse.
hb65e94ceged53g42c6g9e82g8f2dfe4de812: What will you do if she sends more?
h9c865244g619eg4ea8gab0cgae6b47585a7e: Oh, I'm counting on it. I'll be ready for her.
he2f07f90gc16bg4c29ga8d2g280f681ca843: And the first step is to go home - to Baldur's Gate. I've got a score to settle.
h8851016cg89ddg4557gb9adg5e76c822da83: Not many people survive an archdevil's fury.
he038d3f7gd779g40abg9b0dg46d0c0af7e05: I haven't survived her yet. She'll come for me - and I'll need to be ready.
h35d53c14g1094g4286gaadag542d3b0557bc: Who was that? In your memory?
h34842a6bgaa13g4f36g945fg6d476fdede4f: I've never heard that language before.
ha1a39a12g1286g4733g9415g2d28717e87b1: Lucky you. It's the devils' tongue - infernal. Good for cursing and counting, not so good for small talk.
h16bc43b3gbeadg42d2gb240g956c91e44f63: I'm going from one hell straight into another - home, to Baldur's Gate. I've got a score to settle.
h6572c702g55a8g400fga0acg1201f22a093c: I could use the company, but until I've shaken Zariel off my back, I'd only put a target on yours.
h8f95bc20g11f4g465bga885g1ae2081fb528: My advice? Stay away from the city. When I catch up with the fuckers who did this to me, the streets will run red.
h77f18561g7c1dg4d92gb451g521600ffed36: My offer still stands - let's travel together.
he9ae2c8bg4353g4bc2g9b45gadedb63eeec6: Who are you looking for in the city?
h150c5c2bg4b70g40b7g9479gef3c60d27f94: Politicians. The fuckers who sent me to hell in the first place.
hc5cb246bg0a82g47ccgb6b6g7fd523216a8d: My advice? Stay away from the city. When I catch up with them, the streets will run red.
h3809cae3g2ec8g439agb15cgbdf07b88d273: Aren't you worried about what the parasite's doing to you?
h10dffe78ga8d8g4b8eg9fcdg801ec4e1a6b8: And what is it doing to me exactly? I barely felt a wriggle from it 'til you came along.
hc2bdf1bdg3f82g4102gb18dg07bd8c41d5f8: It'll turn you into a mind flayer.
h21faf88ag27b2g4998g9194gbc62cf1db602: Doesn't seem to have turned you into a mind flayer, unless you've tucked your tentacles down your throat.
h88631626g3b0dg4b93ga793g3408def58775: I'll start worrying when it gives me a reason to.
hb471e3a6gc4bcg4300ga26agc0d61f53991f: Take your time - it's only my soul on the line.
hf4a88d6cgb867g4d42gb6cfg97ff136c14de: I decided to help them instead. I'm taking your head.
hafe798a9g9d0cg404ag91fbgb6cc27480d27: Could have sworn I told you to piss off. Maybe I imagined it.
h3739a189gec9bg47d8g8c67gcb94c1e4c490: I met the people looking for you - and killed them.
ha5cc1441ga8b1g4557gaa35g089c103d1ed9: Oh. Sorry I told you to piss off just now. Come on over here - we should talk.
hb9a5c9c2gd45cg4900g8c60g7850d47c7a6c: They said you're a fiend, that you belong in hell.
h223e2773g47ebg459cgae61g55d900b78ce3: I don't belong in hell any more than you do. But I was there.
ha9bd735cg95d8g4bcagb946ge1536f72ae1e: You shouldn't be sorry - I'm going to kill you as well.
h09f6b399g7270g4da7g9bb8g76305a10a1c5: I met the people looking for you. They say you're a killer - a fiend.
h387c416fg69b4g436bgabd9g2985ee25e4e6: And you believe them? Those bastards are trying to feed you a crock of shit.
h9d65aebdg6ad3g4537g80f0gb5c5b5200f03: Piss off, you little vulture. I'm not dead yet.
ha2bb0f8dg60cfg4452g9598gbae96f396f33: The people hunting you are. I took care of it.
h8b7e4832g335ag4e18ga874gc310fb94e395: Why the change of heart? Ah, doesn't matter - thank you.
hb67e47f7g19d1g493egbe21gf287f69b3204: You will be soon - I'm taking your head.
